description_long: This is a robust rectangular storage box constructed primarily from wood, reinforced with wide vertical and horizontal metal bands for added durability. The box features a hinged lid that opens upwards, revealing a spacious, empty interior suitable for storing various items. The wood has a natural, slightly weathered finish, while the metal bands have a matte, slightly aged appearance, suggesting outdoor or heavy-duty use. There are no visible handles, locks, or labeling areas on the exterior, giving it a utilitarian and secure look. The box stands on four short legs, elevating it slightly off the ground, which helps protect the contents from moisture or dirt. Its design is reminiscent of traditional storage chests often found in garages, workshops, or outdoor urban environments.
description: A sturdy wooden storage box reinforced with metal bands and a hinged lid, featuring a weathered finish and no visible handles or locks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open hinged lid and spacious interior, with three prominent vertical metal bands on the front panel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the lid and the depth of the box, with metal bands running across the top.
description_view_2: Rear view with the lid closed, displaying the full set of metal bands and the box's rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the lid partially open and the side panel's wood grain and metal reinforcement.
